David M. Balter, Esq., Staff Counsel, 415-703-4863, for defendant/moving party State of California.

*ARGUED and the Court took DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT UNDER SUBMISSION as to the 3rd Cause of Action. Otherwise, the court adopted its tentative ruling: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST, 2ND, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION; NOT OPPOSED. GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, NO OPPOSITION.
